---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sam-a-welch/
    - icon: github
      text: Github (Work)
      href: https://github.com/sawelch-NIVA
    - icon: github
      text: Github (Personal)
      href: https://github.com/samawelch

---

This blog is in no way affiliated with the fine people of Switzerland, and any opinions expressed are my own, rather than theirs, or my employer's.
